basic_details.job_title: GMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief General Manager / General Manager Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) Chief General Manager / General Manager (Signaling) Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website of Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC). A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GMRC Chief General Manager / General Manager (Signaling) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate engineering in Electrical/ Electrical & Electronics / Electronics & Communication/ Applied Electronics / Power Electronics / Industrial Electronics/ Instrumentation & control discipline from a Govt. recognized University/Institute
qualification.details: Graduate engineering in Electrical/ Electrical & Electronics / Electronics & Communication/ Applied Electronics / Power Electronics / Industrial Electronics/ Instrumentation & control discipline from a Govt. recognized University/Institute with a minimum of 10 years of relevant experience in design/specifications, planning, administration of contracts, installation, testing, commissioning of Signaling/ PSD System works in Railway Systems/ Metro/ LRT/ Sub-urban Rail/RRTS.

salary_details.details: For contract basis: IDA Scale - 120000-280000 For deputation basis: As per standards terms & conditions of deputation For post-superannuation basis: Consolidated pay of ₹ 1,70,000 per month

selection_process: Personal Interview Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GMRC Chief General Manager / General Manager (Signaling) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GMRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GMRC Chief General Manager / General Manager (Signaling) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 26th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate engineering degree in specific disciplines like Electrical, Electronics, or Instrumentation from a recognized university and possess at least 10 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Chief General Manager / General Manager (Signaling) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 62 years as of the specified date mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The salary is offered on an IDA Scale of 120000-280000 for contract basis, with other options for deputation and post-superannuation.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Chief General Manager / General Manager (Signaling) post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy announced for the Chief General Manager / General Manager (Signaling) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this GMRC job?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official GMRC website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Personal Interview, followed by Document Verification and a Medical Examination for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this GMRC recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is on a contract basis. Specific terms may apply for deputation or post-superannuation roles.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the direct links to the official notification PDF and the online application portal in the "Important Links" section of this article.
